MAJOR ELECTIVE MAJOR ELECTIVE

At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level

12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD

Or a comparable AOSC course at the 200 level. **AOSC498, the senior research project, will be submitted as a scholarship in practice course. *** Excluded from the 2.0 average calculation
